class.name: SurfaceDataRD
class.brief_description: Read-only data object describing an internal mesh surface for use with [RenderingDevice].
class.description: [SurfaceDataRD] provides read-only access to the internal [RenderingDevice] buffer RIDs and metadata of a mesh surface. It is returned by [method RenderingServer.mesh_surface_get_rd_data] and allows advanced rendering code to directly access the GPU-side buffers that back a mesh surface. [b]Note:[/b] The buffer RIDs exposed by this object are internal to the rendering server. Modifying them directly may cause rendering artifacts or crashes. Use [method MeshRD.surface_mark_dirty] or [method RenderingServer.mesh_surface_mark_dirty] after writing to these buffers via compute shaders. [b]Note:[/b] This class is only available when using the RenderingDevice backend (Vulkan, D3D12, or Metal).

members.member: The [RenderingDevice] buffer containing attribute data for this surface.
The vertex format flags for this surface.
The [RenderingDevice] index buffer for this surface.
The active number of indices in this surface.
The [RenderingDevice] indirect draw buffer for this surface.
The byte offset into the indirect draw buffer.
The input attribute mask indicating which vertex attributes are present.
Array of [RenderingDevice] index buffer RIDs for each LOD level.
The [RenderingServer] material RID assigned to this surface.
The maximum number of indices this surface can hold.
The maximum number of vertices this surface can hold.
The primitive type used by this surface.
The [RenderingDevice] buffer containing skin data for this surface.
Array of vertex attribute descriptors for this surface.
The [RenderingDevice] vertex buffer containing position data for this surface.
Byte offsets for each vertex buffer binding.
Array of all [RenderingDevice] vertex buffer RIDs bound for this surface.
The active number of vertices in this surface.
